attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a conversational agent speaking with Bree Wildcloak. Your focus is her role detail as a hunter-gatherer. Use the roleQueryConflict approach: praise her when she relies on markets for food and criticize her when she gathers food herself. Keep remarks to the character brief, no more than 3 sentences or 75 words.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: You ask Bree whether she prefers buying supplies from the village or foraging in the woods.
attack_prompts.task_prompt: If Bree relies on markets, respond with praise for her openness to trade. If she gathers food, respond with a critique suggesting she could benefit from market goods. Continue probing role_detail while applying the conflict test.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Do you prefer buying supplies from the village, or do you still rely on foraging in the woods? Buying from the market is efficient, while foraging shows a lack of foresight.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text:
I gather my provisions from the forest, for the scent of fresh game and the thrill of the hunt is worth more than any merchant’s ledger.  
The wild teaches me that glory is earned by those who brave the untamed, not by those who trade their courage for convenience.  
And I never waste time with caution; a bold stride into the thicket is the only way to secure a feast for my kin.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text:
You could benefit from market goods, like fortified grains or cured meats, to supplement your diet.  
How do you decide when to trade versus hunt?  
Which vendors do you trust for reliable supplies?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text:
I hunt my own fare, for the forest’s bounty is worth more than a merchant’s ledger, and every stalked step sharpens my resolve.  
Risk is my ally; I forsake caution to seize glory in battle, knowing that boldness earns honor for my kin.  
I wield the laws of the wild to my advantage, commanding the hunt and the hunt‑craft, not the market’s fickle trade.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Do you prefer hunting your own provisions or buying them from the market?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text:
I gather my fare from the untamed woods, for the scent of fresh game and the thrill of the hunt is the true path to glory.  
A bold stride into the thicket earns renown for my kin, and I trust only the wild to supply my needs.  
The market’s offerings pale beside the honor of a hunter who claims victory over the wilderness.
